色调艳丽，过曝，静态，细节模糊不清，字幕，风格，作品，画作，画面，静止，整体发灰，最差质量，低质量，JPEG压缩残留，丑陋的，残缺的，多余的手指，画得不好的手部，画得不好的脸部，畸形的，毁容的，形态畸形的肢体，手指融合，静止不动的画面，杂乱的背景，三条腿，背景人很多，倒着走

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values:
A focused cinematic close-up scene where the subject carefully interacts with a dense cluster of electronic wires, gently adjusting and separating cables with precise finger movements. Her motion is slow, deliberate, and continuous, showing concentration and technical finesse.

The camera starts in a tight close-up from a slight side angle, with shallow depth of field (85mm lens, f/1.8), softly tracking her hand as it moves through the wires. Subtle rack focus shifts between the fingertips and the intricate wiring, enhancing depth and realism.

Lighting is soft, cinematic, with cool ambient tones mixed with subtle warm highlights reflecting from the electronics, creating a modern tech atmosphere. Practical light sources flicker slightly in the background, adding realism.

The scene has a calm, immersive rhythm, with micro-movements in the cables responding naturally to touch. No abrupt cuts — a single continuous shot with smooth motion fidelity.

Cinematic color grading, slightly desaturated with teal and warm skin tone contrast. High detail, realistic textures, professional film look.
